mapper.select:
SELECT G.*, P.PROCESSNM, L1.LOCATIONNAME, L2.LOCATIONNAME AS LOCATIONNAME_PROD, C.COMPANYNM FROM TBL_COM_GOODS G LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PROCESS P ON G.PROCESSCD = P.PROCESSCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION L1 ON G.LOCATIONCD = L1.LOCATIONCODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION L2 ON G.LOCATIONCD_PROD = L2.LOCATIONCODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON G.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD
(G.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})
AND G.PARTTYPE = #{parttype}
ORDER BY G.PARTNO OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT G.*, P.PROCESSNM, L1.LOCATIONNAME, L2.LOCATIONNAME AS LOCATIONNAME_PROD, C.COMPANYNM FROM TBL_COM_GOODS G LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PROCESS P ON G.PROCESSCD = P.PROCESSCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION L1 ON G.LOCATIONCD = L1.LOCATIONCODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION L2 ON G.LOCATIONCD_PROD = L2.LOCATIONCODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON G.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD WHERE G.PARTNO = #{PARTNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_GOODS ( PARTNO, PLANTCD, PARTNM, CARTYPE, PARTTYPE, LOTSTDQTY, INTESTYN, SAFETYSTOCK, OPTIMUMSTOCK, UNIT, WEIGHT, TEXTURE, WIDTH, LENGTH, THICK, DIAMETER, STANDARD, UNITWEIGHT, LEADTIME, PALLETSTDINFO, IMPORTPARTYN, WORKSTDPATH, CUSTOMPARTNO, PROCESSCD, USEYN, UNIT_PRICE, LOCATIONCD, LOCATIONCD_PROD, QTYPERBOX, COMPANYCD, TESTYN, MOLDLOCATION, INWEIGHT, QTYPERBONG, WASTELENGTH, IRONSHEETPARTNO, SENSEBASE, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{PARTNO}, #{PLANTCD}, #{PARTNM}, #{CARTYPE}, #{PARTTYPE}, #{LOTSTDQTY}, #{INTESTYN}, #{SAFETYSTOCK}, #{OPTIMUMSTOCK}, #{UNIT}, #{WEIGHT}, #{TEXTURE}, #{WIDTH}, #{LENGTH}, #{THICK}, #{DIAMETER}, #{STANDARD}, #{UNITWEIGHT}, #{LEADTIME}, #{PALLETSTDINFO}, #{IMPORTPARTYN}, #{WORKSTDPATH}, #{CUSTOMPARTNO}, #{PROCESSCD}, #{USEYN}, #{UNIT_PRICE}, #{LOCATIONCD}, #{LOCATIONCD_PROD}, #{QTYPERBOX}, #{COMPANYCD}, #{TESTYN}, #{MOLDLOCATION}, #{INWEIGHT}, #{QTYPERBONG}, #{WASTELENGTH}, #{IRONSHEETPARTNO}, #{SENSEBASE}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_GOODS SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE PARTNO = #{PARTNO}
